question: For the NYC high school that ranked in the top 7 by overall score in all three school years: 2006-07 and 2009-11, find the neighborhood named after this high school. Finally report the New York village where the builder of the earliest constructed bridge that connects this neighborhood with the mainland is buried. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Identify the Chicago library branch that ranked in the top five for circulation and visitors, and top three for computer sessions, every year from 2019 to 2021. Return the branch name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

I want to study the demographic in NYC. Can you find me the zip code of the NYC high school that was in the top 3 by overall progress score in the school year 2011-13 and had an A grade in the 2010-11 progress. Report the percentage of White people contributing to the racial makeup of the neighborhood whose primary ZIP code is the same as that high school based on data in 2010 census?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Can you find me the NYC elementary school in District 15 that ranked in the top 2 by performance category score over each school year from 2010-13. For the neighborhood this elementary school is located in, which park is this neighborhood bounded by? Report the size of this park in arce. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Can you find me the NYC elementary school in District 2 that ranked in the top 3 by performance category score over each school year from 2010-13. For the neighborhood this elementary school is located in, who is it named after? Only report the year when this person is born. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Across 2021-2023, which Missouri state agency stayed in the top five for professional services spending and also had the highest average employee count? What city is its headquarters in? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Across 2019-2021, identify the Texas counties that consistently rank in the top five for capital outlay spending. From those, keep only the counties that also rank in the statewide top five for releases from the Department of Criminal Justice in each of those years. For the remaining counties, compute the average annual intake counts from the Department of Criminal Justice over 2019-2021 and report the largest average, rounded to one decimal. Return the number only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Consider Harris, Travis, Dallas, and Bexar counties. Determine which of these consistently ranked in the statewide top five for releases from the Department of Criminal Justice from 2019 to 2021. Among those, compute the average annual intake counts from the Department of Criminal Justice over 2019-2021 and identify the county with the highest average. What is that county's seat? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Across January 2019-2021, identify the issuing agencies that consistently ranked in the top 20 by total parking-violation fines. From those, keep only the U.S. national law-enforcement bodies and find which had the highest average number of January moving violations from 2019-2021. Which federal agency operates that law-enforcement body? Return the agency name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Identify the Chicago city department that consistently ranked in the top five for ordinance appropriations (with non-zero budget) and also had the highest average salary budget recommendations from 2019 to 2021. Return the department name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
